mapper.select: select i.*, (select u.name from sys_user u where i.user_id=u.user_id)as userName, (select t.name from test_team t where i.team_id=t.id and t.del_flag=0 ) as teamName from test_technicist i ${ew.customSqlsegment}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_technicist(user_id, team_id, post_name, post_grade, certificate_name, certificate_url, skill, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.userId}, #{entity.teamId}, #{entity.postName}, #{entity.postGrade}, #{entity.certificateName}, #{entity.certificateUrl}, #{entity.skill}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into test_technicist(user_id, team_id, post_name, post_grade, certificate_name, certificate_url, skill, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.userId}, #{entity.teamId}, #{entity.postName}, #{entity.postGrade}, #{entity.certificateName}, #{entity.certificateUrl}, #{entity.skill}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id) , team_id = values(team_id) , post_name = values(post_name) , post_grade = values(post_grade) , certificate_name = values(certificate_name) , certificate_url = values(certificate_url) , skill = values(skill) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
mapper.select:
SELECT tab1.name as label, tab1.user_id as value FROM test_technicist tab2 LEFT JOIN sys_user tab1 ON tab2.user_id = tab1.user_id WHERE tab2.team_id >0 and tab1.name is not null
AND tab1.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')
select technicist_id, product_type_id, product_type_name, product_id, product_name from test_technicist_capacity where technicist_id =#{id}

SELECT t1.product_id As productId, t1.product_name As productName, t2.product_type_id As productTypeId, t2.product_type_name As productTypeName FROM test_product t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_type t2 ON t1.product_type_id = t2.product_type_id WHERE t1.is_valid = 1 AND t1.del_flag = 0 AND t2.is_valid = 1 AND t2.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into test_technicist_capacity(technicist_id, product_type_id, product_type_name, product_id, product_name) values
(#{entity.technicistId}, #{entity.productTypeId}, #{entity.productTypeName}, #{entity.productId}, #{entity.productName})
mapper.delete:
delete from test_technicist_capacity where technicist_id IN
#{id}
